data.title: Coffee Holding Company (JVA) reports $23.9M net sales in Q3, 2025, up by 27% from 2024, but faces $1.19M net loss.
data.description: In Staten Island on September 12, 2025, Coffee Holding Co., Inc. (Nasdaq: JVA) disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal quarter concluding on July 31, 2025. The Company reported net sales of $23.9 million in comparison to $18.8 million for the corresponding period in 2024, marking a 27% rise. Nevertheless, they encountered a net loss of $1.19 million for the period due to their derivative positions causing a $2.2 million negative effect on profitability, as stated by Andrew Gordon, the President and CEO of the Company.

data.title: "Global Quantum Dot Photonic Night Vision Sensor Array market report 2025-2035 shows early adoption by SWIR Vision Systems, Emberion, and Qurv Technologies."
data.description: The Quantum Dot Photonic Night Vision Sensor Array Market report has been recently released by ResearchAndMarkets.com. It focuses on the analysis of this market segment for the period 2025 to 2035. Quantum Dot Photonic Night Vision Sensor Arrays, known as QD-PNVSA, are solid-state image-sensing chips. These chips contain engineered semiconductor quantum dots deposited as a thin photo-absorbing film directly onto a silicon read-out ci. This report provides a global and regional analysis, with a detailed focus on applications, product types, and country-level analysis. It offers insights into the growing market trends and forecasts for the mentioned period.

data.title: AV introduces Tomahawk Grip TA5 controller, 8 inches in size, to enhance capabilities of warfighters for various missions.
data.description: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, has revealed the Tomahawk Grip TA5, a new 8-inch tactical controller. This device is specifically created to provide improved capabilities for various missions of modern soldiers. The controller is aimed at enhancing efficiency and effectiveness during operations.

data.title: Amerant Bank opens 21st banking center in Miami Beach at 427 W 41 St, continuing expansion in South Florida.
data.description: In Coral Gables, FL, on September 12, 2025, Amerant Bank, Florida’s favored bank, disclosed the launch of its inaugural Miami Beach Banking Center at 427 W 41 St. This addition signifies Amerant’s 21st banking center in Florida, showing the bank’s continuous growth across the state. This step follows Amerant’s recent establishment of its West Palm Beach Banking Center and Regional Office, further solidifying its presence in South Florida.

data.title: FLOKI gains 3.56% on $16.5M Binance trading volume, as technical indicators signal bullish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI has experienced a 3.56% increase in value, with a trading volume reaching $16.5 million on the Binance platform. Technical analysis indicates a bullish MACD momentum and a neutral RSI positioning, suggesting the possibility of further upward movement in value.

data.title: Sandbox VR expanding to Italy with first location in Treviso with €1.5 million investment by Immexia Srl. Up to 40 more locations planned nationwide.
data.description: Italy will soon welcome Sandbox VR, a top player in location-based virtual reality, thanks to entrepreneurs Vito Scavo and Alessandro Bergamo. Their company, Immexia Srl, has acquired exclusive rights to launch the brand in the country. The inaugural venue is set to launch in December in Treviso on Viale della Repubblica, with an initial investment of €1.5 million. This launch is part of a grander plan to establish up to 40 locations nationwide.

data.title: Stablecoins reach $300B on CoinMarketCap, facing discrepancies on tracking platforms like CoinGecko and DefiLlama.
data.description: With a market capitalization exceeding $300 billion, the stablecoin market has reached a significant milestone according to data on CoinMarketCap. However, variations in figures shown on platforms such as CoinGecko and DefiLlama underscore the difficulties in accurately monitoring cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: LITGRID AB to select new CEO; parent company EPSO-G (company code: 302826889) based in Vilnius, Lithuania.
data.description: A newly established energy company, EPSO-G, has recently entered the market with a company code of 302826889. The company is based in Vilnius, Lithuania, at Laisvės pr. 10. EPSO-G is gearing up to make a significant impact in the energy sector with its fresh approach and innovative solutions.

data.title: Hang Feng Tech Innovation Co., Ltd. prices IPO at $4/share with 1,375,000 shares, trading on Nasdaq as "FOFO" from Sep 12.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Hang Feng Technology Innovation Co., Ltd., a Hong Kong firm offering corporate management consulting and asset management services, disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The offering consists of 1,375,000 Ordinary Shares priced at US$4.0 per share. The ordinary shares have gained approval for listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market and are set to begin trading on September 12, 2025, under the ticker symbol “FOFO.”

data.title: Datalogz introduces BI Similarity toolkit to remove duplicate reports/dashboards, aiming to end data chaos in analytics.
data.description: Datalogz, a leading company in resolving BI sprawl for data-savvy organizations, revealed the introduction of BI Similarity, a groundbreaking toolkit that enables businesses to systematically remove redundant reports and dashboards leading to data disorder in analytics setups. Featuring within the Datalogz Control Tower, the innovative BI Similarity engine offers automated functions to tackle a prevalent yet frequently ignored issue in business intelligence. This launch signifies a crucial milestone in streamlining data operations for enterprises, optimizing efficiency, and enhancing accuracy in analytics processes.

data.title: RingCentral increases credit facility to $1.24 billion with $930 million undrawn, led by Bank of America and JPMorgan.
data.description: In Belmont, California, RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a prominent player in AI-driven business communications, recently revealed the enlargement and prolongation of its current credit agreement, known as the “Restated Credit Agreement.” This deal was spearheaded by Bank of America and JPMorgan, joined by Wells Fargo, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Mizuho, and other participants. The enhanced credit facility has now reached $1.24 billion, with $930 million yet to be utilized.

data.title: Borderlands 4 now available worldwide for PS5, Xbox, and PC. Nintendo Switch release on Oct 3, 2025. Critics praise game.
data.description: Today, 2K and Gearbox Software revealed the global availability of Borderlands®4, the newest installment in the iconic Borderlands series. The popular looter-shooter game is now accessible on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam and the Epic Games Store. Additionally, Borderlands 4 for Nintendo Switch™ 2 is set to release on Friday, October 3, 2025. For a sneak peek, check out the official launch cinematic on YouTube. Early critical reviews have been lauding the game for its innovative features.

SCHEDULED NEWS CONFERENCE ON CHARLIE KIRK MURDER INVESTIGATION DELAYED A news conference about the latest information on the investigation into the fatal shooting of Charlie Kirk was pushed back 30 minutes, to 9:30 a.m. ET, the Utah governor’s office announced.

data.title: Toncoin (TON) is trading at $3.20, up 0.91%. Technical indicators point to bullish momentum, with RSI neutral and MACD positive.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Toncoin (TON) is currently valued at $3.20, experiencing a daily increase of 0.91%. Analyzing the technical indicators reveals that there is bullish momentum in the market. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for TON is in a neutral position, indicating potential for growth, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals positive divergence.

data.title: Enovation Controls, part of Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO), named to 2025 Best Workplaces in Manufacturing list by Fortune Media and Great Place To Work.
data.description: A Sarasota-based company, Helios Technologies' operating company, Enovation Controls, has been recognized by Fortune Media and Great Place to Work as one of the 2025 Best Workplaces. The parent company, listed on the NYSE as HLIO, has seen one of its subsidiaries achieve this prestigious recognition.
